productDisplayName: Mr.Men Men's Wave Rider Grey Melange T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey melange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, short sleeves, and with graphic and flock print on the frontFitting ComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking, remove promptly Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Specially designed for surfers, this white t-shirt from the Mr. Happy collection of mr. men brings out the true spirit of serious beach vacation. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee wicks away sweat and keeps you comfortable and dry. Pair it with bermudas and comfortable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the international collection at myntra to complete your fashion statement.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
